rules: Do not log full phone numbers or addresses in debug output.
Do not echo more PII than needed to confirm user intent.
Mask sensitive values in summaries (e.g., phone: ***-***-1234).
Never embed credentials, API keys, or tokens in outputs.
Use platform-provided auth and connections only.
If auth is missing, return an AUTH_REQUIRED error response envelope.
Request only the minimum scopes/permissions required by the selected storageMode.
Prefer per-user storage scope unless user explicitly requests shared.
If running in a personal/dev environment, prefer synthetic data for PII use cases unless user confirms real data usage.
For enterprise/LOB use, assume a managed/custom environment with appropriate reviews.
environment_guidance.sourceNote: Align to internal Copilot Studio agent guidance (data sensitivity, environment selection, access control, no hard-coded secrets).
